title: Create: Stardust
description: Stardust adds new tools wich can be crafted with the "Create" mod.
body:
## Description
Stardust is a mod that adds new tools that are more powerful than netherite. The "Create" mod is required to craft these tools.

## How to...
- ### Craft the ingot
> To craft the new ingot, you need to mix Stardust and a Netherite ingot with a superheated Blazeburner.

- ### Get Stardust
> To get Stardust, you have to crush a Nether Star.

- ### Upgrade Tools
> To upgrade your tools, you need a Star Ingot and an smithing template, which you get from the new boss.

- ### Spawn the new boss
> You need a Void Shard, which you mix with 4 Amethyst Shards and 2 Stardust using a superheated Blazeburner. To spawn the boss, right-click on the ground with the Void Shard.

## Information
This mod will not receive any future updates as it was my first mod and I am now moving on to other projects.
